data.title: Superior Plus (TSX: SPB) declares Q1 2026 dividend of CAD $0.045/share, annualized rate of CAD $0.18/share. Payable on April 15, 2026.
data.description: In Toronto, Superior Plus Corp. (TSX: SPB) disclosed that its Board of Directors greenlit a quarterly dividend of CAD $0.045 per common share. The payment is scheduled for April 15, 2026, for shareholders on record as of March 31, 2026. Currently, Superior's annualized cash dividend rate stands at CAD $0.18 per share, with this dividend eligible for Canadian income tax benefits. Superior Plus is a prominent distributor in North America.

data.title: Targa Resources Corp. (NYSE: TRGP) files Form 10-K for year ended Dec. 31, 2025; available on SEC website.
data.description: On February 19, 2026, Targa Resources Corp. (NYSE: TRGP) submitted its Form 10-K to the Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) for the fiscal year concluding on December 31, 2025. Interested parties can view the report on the SEC's website at www.sec.gov.

data.title: Onto Innovation falls short on Q4 targets but exceeds views with higher guidance, impressing investors.
data.description: Onto Innovation fell slightly short of Wall Street's expectations for the fourth quarter, reporting earnings that did not meet projections. However, the company exceeded market forecasts with its future outlook. The positive outlook provided by Onto Innovation indicates strong potential for growth, offering a promising outlook despite the missed targets in the previous quarter.

data.title: Walmart's new CEO delivers lower outlook despite beating earnings, announces major buyback plan.
data.description: Newly appointed CEO of Walmart presents disappointing future expectations in the company's first report, contrasting the positive performance in key metrics. While the earnings surpassed projections, the guidance provided by Walmart fell short of expectations. The company also announced a significant buyback plan as part of its latest developments.

data.title: Terminix's $6.8B threat: Termite Tour highlights damage risk to homes. Simulation shows hidden reality of termites.
data.description: In Memphis, Tennessee, Termites pose a major threat to homes across the country, earning them the nickname "The Silent Destroyers." These pests can cause extensive structural damage without homeowners even realizing they are there. Terminix®, a Rentokil Terminix company, has introduced a new "Termite Tour" to showcase the rapid devastation termites can cause. This simulated experience, inspired by Miami, aims to bring attention to the hidden dangers of termite activity. Termites are known for their ability to quickly wreak havoc, making it essential for homeowners to stay vigilant.

data.title: Bitcoin options market favoring $60K retest in Feb; capped under $70K with bearish traders, BTC ETF outflows hint at yearly low.
data.description: The price of Bitcoin is expected to remain below $70,000 as traders utilize bearish options tactics. Furthermore, the outflows from spot Bitcoin exchange-traded funds indicate a potential revisit to the lowest value of the year.

data.title: VivoPower announces leadership changes; global developer and owner of powered land and data center infrastructure, Nasdaq: VVPR.
data.description: On February 19, 2026, VivoPower International PLC (Nasdaq: VVPR) disclosed adjustments to its executive leadership team. VivoPower, a prominent B Corp-certified company focusing on powered land and data center infrastructure for AI compute applications, made this announcement.

data.title: Calavo Growers to reveal First Quarter 2026 earnings on March 12; Nasdaq-GS: CVGW, global in fresh produce.
data.description: On February 19, 2026, in Santa Paula, California, Calavo Growers, Inc., a prominent player in the global market for avocados, tomatoes, papayas, and guacamole, stated its intention to disclose financial outcomes for the fiscal Q1 concluded on January 31, 2026. The organization, trading as Nasdaq-GS: CVGW, is set to unveil these figures and submit its Form 10-Q post-market closure on March 12, 2026.

data.title: Peyto Exploration & Development Corp. in Calgary, Alberta reports strong reserves additions in 2025, with evaluation covering 100% of reserves.
data.description: In Calgary, Alberta, on February 19, 2026, Peyto Exploration & Development Corp. (TSX: PEY) shared its latest independent reserves report as of December 31, 2025. The assessment, carried out by GLJ Ltd., covered 100% of Peyto's reserves, marking the Company's 27th year of effective reserves development. The financial and operational data disclosed in this announcement relies on estimated unaudited financial results for the year ending on December 31, 2025. Find more details under "Unaudited Financial Information" in the Advisories section of this release.

data.title: Goodfellow Inc. (TSX: GDL) reports Q4 & FY results ending Nov 30, 2025, declares dividend.
data.description: In Delson, Quebec on February 19, 2026, Goodfellow Inc. (TSX: GDL) disclosed its latest financial performance.
